ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-29-2011 Continued To Jul-13-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Glen Moss for Lecia Wilson.

The Court stated that there are some things missing from the petition and asked if there could be a waiver of accounting. Mr. Moss stated that were no assets and no liabilities, and the the house was lost to foreclosure. Mr. Moss was directed to speak to the Probate Examiner. The matter was continued to July 13, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Moss will file a declaration addressing the Examiner's notes.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
